title: After spent 30+ hrs building loops...
summary: AI Jason shares 30+ hours of experience building AI agent loops and offers a free course on building AI agents. The video links to a GitHub repository with a loop engineer template and codebase harness, plus a workshop in the AI Builder Club.
writeup: AI Jason distills 30+ hours of building AI agent loops into a walkthrough of agentic workflow patterns. The video points to a GitHub repository containing a loop engineer template and a codebase harness, along with a workshop hosted in the AI Builder Club. It also bundles a free course on building AI agents. The practical takeaway is a set of reusable templates and resources for implementing agent loops.
